woodcraft.name: Woodcraft
woodcraft.description: Knowledge of bows, canopy fighting, and forest material use.

horsemanship.name: Horsemanship
horsemanship.description: Mounted handling, riding discipline, and rapid maneuver.

poisoncraft.description: Toxins, venoms, and battlefield poisoning methods.

hill_fighting.name: Hill Fighting
hill_fighting.description: Elevation use, ambushes from ridges, and rough-ground cohesion.

formation_warfare.description: Coordinated massed fighting, drill, and line discipline.

fortification.name: Fortification
fortification.description: Defensive works, hardened camps, and static battlefield control.

mobility.description: Rapid movement, raiding routes, and pursuit.

stealth.name: Stealth
stealth.description: Concealment, screening, and quiet battlefield movement.

shock_resistance.name: Shock Resistance
shock_resistance.description: Holding under charge and surviving collision warfare.

seafaring.description: Water travel, seamanship, and littoral operations.

navigation.name: Navigation
navigation.description: River routes, coastal bearings, and operational wayfinding.

desert_survival.name: Desert Survival
desert_survival.description: Heat adaptation, sparse logistics, and arid campaigning.

endurance.name: Endurance
endurance.description: Sustained campaigning under cold, hunger, or exhaustion.
